name: Myutant Fusion
name_jp: フュージョン・ミュートリアス
desc: Fusion Summon 1 "Myutant" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from your hand or field. If your opponent has activated a card or effect this turn, you can use up to 1 monster each from your Deck and GY as Fusion Material. You can only activate 1 "Myutant Fusion" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 "Myutant" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from your hand or field. If your opponent has activated a card or effect this turn, you can use up to 1 monster each from your Deck and GY as Fusion Material. You can only activate 1 "Myutant Fusion" per turn.

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
